headline: Strong Results, Lower Target: What’s Happening at PowerFleet, Inc. (AIOT)
summary: PowerFleet, Inc. (NASDAQ:AIOT) is among the best low priced stocks to get rich in 2026. On June 16, Raymond James cut the price target on PowerFleet, Inc. (NASDAQ:AIOT) to $7, down from $8. This comes despite the company’s Q4 results surpassing expectations and a strengthened FY27 outlook pointing to stronger growth and profitability into year-end. […]
